699050884.jp_real: トドメとなるまで、油断はできない！
699050884.en_literal: I can't afford to let my guard down until the final blow.
699050884.english: Careful not to trip and fall... or get blown up!

872125832.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
872125832.en_literal: Got a good grip on it.

16432960.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
16432960.jp_real: これにて終局。終わらせましょう。
16432960.en_literal: This is the end. Let's finish it.
16432960.english: Now for the final act! Let's finish this!

388276863.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
388276863.jp_real: 急所は押さえたわ。いいぞ！
388276863.en_literal: I've got the opening move covered. Let's go!

579306458.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
579306458.en_literal: I'll take on the iron armor!

358580558.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
358580558.jp_real: 機械相手となれば情けなど無用ね
358580558.en_literal: If you're going to be my opponent, pity is useless.
358580558.english: Machines shall receive no pity from me!

436123925.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
436123925.jp_real: 何としても、ここは通らせてもらう！
436123925.en_literal: I'll be damned if I let you pass!

753421809.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
753421809.jp_real: 連携ならば、私たちに武器があるわ！
753421809.en_literal: If we link, we've got a chance.

919343975.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
919343975.english: It's as if this clash were fated.

340330228.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
340330228.jp_real: 相手にとって不足はなし
340330228.en_literal: No need to hold back against the enemy.
340330228.english: These two make a formidable team!

594712219.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
594712219.jp_real: 手応えあった！いけるわ！
594712219.en_literal: I've got a good grip on it. I can do this.

217997614.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
217997614.jp_real: 覚悟には覚悟で応えん！
217997614.english: I will meet your resolve in kind!

834996919.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
834996919.jp_real: リリスを追わなければいけないの！
834996919.en_literal: I have to cover the release!
834996919.english: We can't let Lilith get away!

1033979287.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
1033979287.jp_real: ウチ使って見せましょ！
1033979287.en_literal: Let's show them what we've got!

469533357.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
469533357.jp_real: ここで倒れるわけにはいかない！
469533357.en_literal: I can't afford to fall here!
469533357.english: You won't get the best of us!

790508345.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
790508345.jp_real: 終わらせましょう！イド！

748359661.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
748359661.english: Feel the lash of my blade!

30315953.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
30315953.jp_real: なんである。倒すほかなし。
30315953.en_literal: No matter what, I have no choice but to defeat you!
30315953.english: First things first. We have to bring him down.

445317414.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
445317414.jp_real: スキは必ず見つかるはず
445317414.en_literal: The path will surely be found.
445317414.english: There must be something we can do!

88158383.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
88158383.jp_real: 決して倒せない相手ではないわ
88158383.en_literal: I'm not an opponent you can never defeat.

82394043.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
82394043.en_literal: The sword has arrived. With this, I can...
82394043.english: My blade cuts pure and true!

149237643.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
149237643.jp_real: これは…あのフラカウントとは違う
149237643.en_literal: This is... different from that Fracture.
149237643.english: This has to be a different Fyuran, right?

654060894.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
654060894.jp_real: このまま押し切りましょう！

844093545.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
844093545.jp_real: 今は目の前の敵に集中！
844093545.en_literal: Right now, I'm focusing on the enemy in front of me.
844093545.english: Focus on the enemy at hand!

544003025.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
544003025.jp_real: この黒き霊気は、いったい...
544003025.en_literal: This black blood... what on earth...
544003025.english: I know I've felt this sinister chill before.

121714648.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
121714648.jp_real: マガツヒョウムゴトキル

17931410.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
17931410.jp_real: このまま畳みかけましょう！

254599858.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
254599858.jp_real: ガランツァ将軍の後に続きましょう！
254599858.en_literal: Let us follow in General Gallanza's footsteps!

630542147.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
630542147.jp_real: マガツモウエンゴトキル
630542147.en_literal: I'll cut through your endless arrogance!

159616898.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
159616898.jp_real: マギラフリラ将軍の援護に感謝ね
159616898.en_literal: Thanks for the support, General Magiraphurira.
159616898.english: I need to thank Maglielle properly when this is over.

643287631.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
643287631.jp_real: この身、朽ちようと！押し止める！
643287631.english: I won't rest until you're vanquished!

467519445.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
467519445.jp_real: 私たちが守るわ！絶対に！

33854359.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
33854359.jp_real: これ以上好きにはさせない！覚悟！
33854359.en_literal: I won't let you go any further! Ready!
33854359.english: You've endangered these skies long enough! Face your death!

993166260.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
993166260.jp_real: 結着をつきましょう！ニリス！
993166260.english: This is where it ends, Lilith!

627677117.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
627677117.jp_real: 思いの力に報いてみせる！
627677117.en_literal: I'll show you the power of my will!
627677117.english: This is for all the lives you've uprooted, Lilith!

1056233114.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
1056233114.jp_real: あなたの計画はここで終わり！
1056233114.english: We're going to rip your plans to shreds!

325326730.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
325326730.jp_real: この空を救うためならば
325326730.en_literal: If I must save this sky...

779476514.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
779476514.jp_real: 破壊の龍の化身と、相対することになるなんてね
779476514.en_literal: To think I'd end up facing the embodiment of the Dragon of Destruction...
779476514.english: I never thought I'd be dueling the Dragon of Destruction.

457472745.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
457472745.jp_real: あ、きらめす！せめつづけましょう！
457472745.en_literal: I won't give up. Let's keep pressing the attack!
457472745.english: Hit that dragon with everything you've got!

485184478.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
485184478.jp_real: 我が刃にて切り開かん！
485184478.en_literal: I'll cleave open your fate with my blade!
485184478.english: None can escape my katana's reach!

235092833.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
235092833.jp_real: このまま攻め続けましょう！

35667122.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
35667122.jp_real: ことごとく断ち切ろう！

448457036.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
448457036.en_literal: I can't go on like this...
448457036.english: Is this really how it ends?

190176161.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
190176161.english: You'll pay for what you've done!

217021946.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
217021946.en_literal: I have to hurry to the back!

865074437.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
865074437.jp_real: 我が刃のひらめきにて一掃せん
865074437.en_literal: By the gleam of my blade, I'll strike first!
865074437.english: In the blink of an eye, your world fades to black.

216094728.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
216094728.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

883000750.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
883000750.jp_real: ニュウオウマイシン！全身アルノミ！
883000750.en_literal: I'll give you my all. Only my whole body remains.

421667159.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
421667159.jp_real: 触媒、見つかるといいのだけど
421667159.english: I hope nothing has happened to the Catalyst.

1026425353.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
1026425353.jp_real: 道を塞ぐ者は、すべて斬る！
1026425353.en_literal: I'll cut down everything that blocks my way!
1026425353.english: You dare stand in my way?

550418833.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
550418833.jp_real: ルリアちゃん、待っていて
550418833.english: Oh Lyria, hold on! We're coming!

593070835.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
593070835.en_literal: I'll have to move out of the way.
593070835.english: Please get out of our way!

720747458.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
720747458.jp_real: アビア教団の教皇。許せるものではないわ。
720747458.en_literal: The leader of the Abia Sect... I won't forgive you!
720747458.english: The sins of Avia are unforgivable!

324986188.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
324986188.jp_real: 敵が多いわ。油断せず行きましょう。
324986188.en_literal: There are a lot of enemies. Let's go without getting careless.
324986188.english: Their numbers are many, but we are mightier!

161796622.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
161796622.jp_real: この暗雲ごと切り開かん！
161796622.english: We must part the ominous clouds!

1049301140.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
1049301140.english: Anything is possible for this crew!

916763805.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
916763805.jp_real: 長いわ無用。頂上へ急がないと。
916763805.en_literal: No need for long speeches. We're in a hurry to reach the top.

12484833.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
12484833.en_literal: I still can't let my guard down.

995699672.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
995699672.jp_real: みんないい技を持っているわ

180772413.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
180772413.jp_real: みんながいると心強いな
180772413.en_literal: It's reassuring to have everyone here.
180772413.english: I'm so thankful for this crew!

95980247.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_PL0000_1
95980247.jp_real: さすがね、団長ちゃんだって。

64963325.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_PL0000_2
64963325.jp_real: 団長ちゃんですごいね！

793380211.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
793380211.english: As the morn cuts the long night!

482356489.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
482356489.jp_real: みんなのチカラ、まさに破竹の勢いね！
482356489.english: No one compares to our combined might!

984498363.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
984498363.jp_real: みんな、この調子でいきましょう！
984498363.en_literal: Everyone, let's keep this momentum going!

625350037.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
625350037.jp_real: 次もみんなで力を合わせましょ！
625350037.en_literal: Let's combine our powers once again, everyone!
625350037.english: Let us prepare for the next battle!

797679907.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
797679907.jp_real: 私たちなら、さらに高みを目指せるはず
797679907.english: There are no heights we cannot scale!

329604865.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0000_1
329604865.jp_real: まだ油断しちゃダメだよ！
329604865.en_literal: You still can't let your guard down!
329604865.english: We have to be careful, okay?

653895091.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0000_2
653895091.english: I'll support you to the bitter end!

1028144178.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0000_3
1028144178.jp_real: ここからだよ！がんばっちゃう！

927265233.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
927265233.en_literal: Hehe, let's do our best again!

977640051.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
977640051.en_literal: Huh? I'll sync up with you again!

785595968.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_PL0000_2
785595968.english: I feel the same about you!

713430478.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_PL0000_3
713430478.jp_real: 団長ちゃんに褒められちゃった！
713430478.en_literal: I got praised by the captain!

341526268.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
341526268.jp_real: ねっ、ふふっ、この調子ね！

633015404.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
633015404.en_literal: Eh? I'll prepare for the next one!

734767776.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
734767776.english: And yet there are still greater heights to climb.

715661102.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0000_2
715661102.jp_real: ええ！息ぴったりだったね！
715661102.en_literal: Huh? That was a perfect timing!
715661102.english: Yes! We were like twin storms!

11135543.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0000_3
11135543.english: I trust you with my life!

822522359.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
822522359.en_literal: I won't let my concentration waver.

13447092.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_PL0000_1
13447092.jp_real: うん。お姉さん、もっと集中するね。
13447092.en_literal: Hmph. I'll focus more from now on, big sister.
13447092.english: Right... I was a bit distracted.

1048324456.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
1048324456.en_literal: This is the swordsmanship of the people of the stars.
1048324456.english: So this is the ancient art of the Astrals!

464159256.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0100
464159256.jp_real: 大丈夫？だっちゃちゃ、けがはない？
464159256.en_literal: Are you okay? Are you hurt?
464159256.english: Captain! Are you hurt at all?

1046543144.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
1046543144.jp_real: カタリナさん、すごいわね。

904874029.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
904874029.english: The course of battle is decided in a single moment.

458130168.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
458130168.jp_real: イオちゃん、すごかったわ！

961066616.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
961066616.english: Harmony makes the whole greater than its parts.

546411071.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
546411071.jp_real: ありがとう、ロゼッタさん

741984902.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
741984902.jp_real: フェリちゃんって、ムチが似合うわね。
741984902.en_literal: Ferry-chan, the whip really suits you.
741984902.english: Your mastery of the whip is impressive!

511617288.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
511617288.jp_real: ありがとう、ランスロットさん

920400709.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
920400709.jp_real: ありがとう、ヴェインさん

269462823.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
269462823.jp_real: 立ち止まってはいられないわね
269462823.en_literal: I can't afford to stop now.

747137277.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
747137277.jp_real: ありがとう、ジークフリートさん

520362663.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
520362663.english: Even the smallest sparrow flies unbound.

1025987589.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
1025987589.jp_real: ヨダルラーラー、すごい！
1025987589.english: Yodarha, you are a true bladesmaster!

938292625.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
938292625.jp_real: 伝説は聞いていたけれど、本当にすごいわね。
938292625.en_literal: I've heard the legends, but you're truly amazing.
938292625.english: A thousand legends aren't worth a single glimpse of your skill!

282062034.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
282062034.jp_real: ありがとう。助かったわ。
282062034.en_literal: Thank you. That was a big help.

1035618331.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
1035618331.jp_real: うん、今のはうまくいったはず
1035618331.english: Well, that couldn't have gone better!

819550183.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
819550183.jp_real: ソーンさん、ありがとう

688536511.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
688536511.jp_real: もうこうもうだ。痛烈な一撃だったわ。
688536511.en_literal: It's over. That was a tremendous blow.
688536511.english: Swift as the viper, sturdy as the tree!

853030107.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
853030107.jp_real: まさにはちくのいきおいね
853030107.en_literal: You're full of destructive energy, aren't you?

792814412.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
792814412.jp_real: ありがとう、ビアトリクスさん

1031780145.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
1031780145.jp_real: 追撃ありがとう、ユーステスさん
1031780145.english: I'm grateful for your help, Eustace!

938365695.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
938365695.jp_real: まさに光彩奪目。素晴らしい追撃ね。
938365695.en_literal: A true masterstroke. What a splendid follow-up.
938365695.english: All eyes drawn to the flame. Excellent technique.

341544973.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
341544973.jp_real: ニュホウアンヤ。まさに闇そのものね。
341544973.en_literal: So this is the darkness... It truly is the embodiment of shadows.
341544973.english: The night unfolds true. You are darkness itself.

560710761.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
560710761.jp_real: ありがとう、ローランさん

842307231.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
842307231.jp_real: 呼吸を合わせてくれたの？
842307231.en_literal: You synchronized your breath with mine?
842307231.english: You read the pattern of my movements!

325743022.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
325743022.jp_real: 次は一撃で仕留めなきゃ
325743022.en_literal: Next, I'll finish you off with one hit.
325743022.english: Next time, I will finish it in one stroke.

457843267.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
457843267.jp_real: 今の、合わせづらくなかった？大丈夫？
457843267.en_literal: Was that combo hard to pull off? You okay?
457843267.english: How's the pace? Can you keep up?

307595261.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
307595261.en_literal: Every day, I just keep on honing my skills.
307595261.english: Strength is built by time and diligence.

1035509717.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
1035509717.jp_real: ペットの子たちも心強いわ
1035509717.en_literal: The little pets are quite spirited too.

702142800.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
702142800.jp_real: もっと上手くできたはず

89153905.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
89153905.english: A candle consumes itself while giving light to others.

899492431.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
899492431.jp_real: まさに龍の雲を穿つが如し
899492431.en_literal: Indeed, it's like a dragon weaving clouds.
899492431.english: You are fierce and wise as the ancient dragons.

785788476.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
785788476.en_literal: I have to prepare for what's next.

296712848.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
296712848.english: Mighty as an ox, swift as a falcon!

510979821.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
510979821.jp_real: 鋭い攻撃。さすがはゼータさんね。
510979821.en_literal: Sharp attack. As expected of you, Zeta.
510979821.english: What fierce attacks! You're amazing, Zeta!

408942888.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
408942888.jp_real: 戦いやすいのはバザラガさんのおかげね！
408942888.en_literal: It's thanks to you, Vaseraga, that this fight is so easy!
408942888.english: These bad guys aren't so tough with you around!

736434356.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
736434356.jp_real: カリオストロちゃん、けがはない？

959263369.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
959263369.jp_real: 繋いでくれてありがとう
959263369.en_literal: Thanks for linking up with me.
959263369.english: Thank you for answering my call.

510426874.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
510426874.jp_real: 天使エイミー、頼りになるわね。

145925018.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
145925018.jp_real: 今だ。更なる高みには届かず。
145925018.en_literal: I still can't reach the next peak.

824489576.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
824489576.jp_real: なんて優雅な湯釜なの
824489576.english: I bow to your bow skills!

282574267.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
282574267.jp_real: ナニヨリモチカラツヨクソシテハヤイ
282574267.en_literal: Stronger than anything, and faster too.
282574267.english: You have mastery over both speed and power.

1062494872.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
1062494872.jp_real: 狙ったところに剣が飛んでくるなんて
1062494872.en_literal: I can't believe a sword came flying right at my target!
1062494872.english: You had them before I could even slash!

593123107.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
593123107.jp_real: さあ、次に備えましょう
593123107.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next.
593123107.english: Ready yourself for the next fight!

789041865.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
789041865.jp_real: 近い波静か。そんな日々が来ればいいわね。
789041865.en_literal: The sea is so calm today. I wish days like this would never end.
789041865.english: It's darkest before dawn, but eventually peace will come.

961204111.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
961204111.jp_real: ありがとう。助かったわ。

993606317.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
993606317.jp_real: ありがとう、フェディエルさん

208521225.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
208521225.jp_real: まだ油断しないでいきましょう

1010056035.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
1010056035.jp_real: 気を引き締めなきゃね

345426698.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
345426698.jp_real: 流星降臨。見事な立ち筋ね。
345426698.en_literal: Meteor Procession? What a magnificent stance.
345426698.english: It's as if your sword is guided by the stars!

652863708.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
652863708.jp_real: シンラバンショウ キリフセン
652863708.en_literal: Setsuna, Kyokasuigetsu, Transient, Apex of Nothingness, Crescent Moon, Dance of Pink Petals, Dance of Blue Petals, Utter Devotion, Butterfly Effect: Moonrise
652863708.english: Run, and you hasten toward destiny.

191938724.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
191938724.english: Our current path will lead to victory!

212864860.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
212864860.jp_real: ラカムさん、次もお願いね。
212864860.en_literal: Rackam, please do it again next time!
212864860.english: I shall call on your aid again, Rackam!

161030695.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
161030695.jp_real: まだ油断してはダメよ。
161030695.en_literal: You still can't let your guard down.

898869358.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
898869358.jp_real: ロー、キ、オ、シュ。さすがね、オイゲンさん。
898869358.english: The wizened tree oft has the strongest roots.

730821412.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
730821412.english: The loveliest flower must bear the sharpest thorns.

133990348.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
133990348.jp_real: 切迫表紙。まるでフェリちゃんを表す言葉ね。
133990348.en_literal: Desperate declaration... It's just like a word that represents Ferry.
133990348.english: Even the formless cloud can give rise to a storm.

316637353.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
316637353.jp_real: 忠勇無双。素晴らしい剣技ね。
316637353.en_literal: You're amazing, Lancelot. That was a splendid display of swordsmanship.
316637353.english: A warrior of virtue needs only one mind.

758591442.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
758591442.jp_real: 合計出撃。頼りになるわね。
758591442.english: Strong as the earth, and yet gentle as a breeze.

114854910.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
114854910.jp_real: 奇炎万丈。私も負けてはいられないわ。
114854910.en_literal: I can't afford to lose either.
114854910.english: Let's see which of our spirits burns the brighter!

706664956.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
706664956.jp_real: 雲上両辺。あなたが味方でよかった。
706664956.en_literal: Clouds parting... I'm glad you're on our side.
706664956.english: It is an honor to fight at your side, Dragon's Bane!

579846600.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
579846600.jp_real: シダイシゴ。あなたは本当に強いわね。
579846600.english: Strength cannot be measured by time or scale.

1050793364.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
1050793364.en_literal: To wake abruptly from a dream...

16698701.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
16698701.jp_real: さあ次！まだまだ油断できないわ！
16698701.en_literal: Alright, next. Can't let my guard down yet.

623173989.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
623173989.jp_real: 熱烈瞬撃！その真の強さは尊敬に値するわ！
623173989.en_literal: The heat of battle is intense. Your true strength is worthy of respect.
623173989.english: Guarding the sweetest nectar are the sharpest thorns.

653934374.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
653934374.jp_real: 新人隊官？よく見えてるのね。
653934374.english: Seek the truth, and the world will find you.

110497428.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
110497428.jp_real: 副領補佐、まさに影の英雄ね。

793526584.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
793526584.jp_real: サンダルフォンさん、次も頼める？
793526584.en_literal: Sandalphon-san, can I count on you again?

589792357.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
589792357.jp_real: 次は追いついて見せる
589792357.en_literal: I'll catch up to you next time!
589792357.english: I'll prove myself during the next fight!

925784268.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
925784268.en_literal: You're going to be the one to take the lead?

790630011.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
790630011.jp_real: ガランツァさん、合わせてくれてありがとう。
790630011.en_literal: Thank you for syncing with me, Gallanza.
790630011.english: Wonderful, Gallanza! Thanks for the assistance!

580486333.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
580486333.jp_real: まさに一体同心。その剣との絆は本物ね。
580486333.en_literal: You're truly in perfect sync. That bond with your sword is genuine, isn't it?
580486333.english: The bond you share with your blade is steadfast and unyielding.

484955655.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
484955655.jp_real: 団長ちゃんのこと、もっとお世話しなきゃ。
484955655.en_literal: I should take better care of Dancho-chan.
484955655.english: Oh dear... I need to take better care of Cappykins!

613730888.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
613730888.jp_real: 我が星や果てありて、地や果てなし。
613730888.en_literal: My life has an end, but my will knows no end.
613730888.english: Where life finds boundary, knowledge finds purchase.

310212588.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
310212588.jp_real: もっと鋭く踏み込まなきゃ
310212588.en_literal: I need to go in deeper.
310212588.english: I must do better. Dig deeper.

931478061.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
931478061.english: Rolan, you're doing great! Let's keep this momentum going!

321533297.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
321533297.en_literal: I won't let you stand in my way.
321533297.english: I must shed all needless movement.

43549774.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
43549774.jp_real: ええ、どういたしまして。
43549774.english: I follow only the surest road to success.

452100492.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
452100492.jp_real: あなたこそ、鮮やかな双剣技だったわ。
452100492.en_literal: You were quite the dazzling swordsman yourself.
452100492.english: In battle, one does not see so much as foresee.

266791903.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
266791903.english: I was only protecting the crew.

556369496.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
556369496.jp_real: 一刀を持って切り伏せ
556369496.en_literal: I'll take the lead and cut through!
556369496.english: I do not wield my art. I live it.

1021134696.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
1021134696.jp_real: 褒め言葉として受け取っていいんだよね？
1021134696.en_literal: I can take that as a compliment, right?
1021134696.english: Do you mean that as a compliment?

378493596.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
378493596.jp_real: あの人に近づけたかな？
378493596.en_literal: Did I get closer to that person?
378493596.english: Will I ever be like him?

729199486.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
729199486.jp_real: ありがとう、ガンダゴウザさん

881089560.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
881089560.jp_real: ゼタさんが崩してくれたおかげだよ！
881089560.english: It was all because you broke their line!

344150934.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
344150934.jp_real: バザラガさんがそれを言う？

12071819.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
12071819.en_literal: This is the name of my blade.
12071819.english: It is the dance of the butterfly.

230255022.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
230255022.jp_real: まだまだ、こんなものではないわ。
230255022.english: That needed more speed, more precision.

876752528.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
876752528.jp_real: エンルしないで！次も合わせるわ！
876752528.en_literal: Don't hold back. I'll sync with you again next time.
876752528.english: I'll face whatever stands in our way!

385962333.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
385962333.jp_real: えっ？うそ、うそうかなぁ？

933771294.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
933771294.jp_real: ええ、遅れは取らないわ。

991497689.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
991497689.en_literal: Every day, I train harder to reach even greater heights.
991497689.english: Training is a mountain scaled step by step.

540366313.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
540366313.jp_real: ええ、間に合ってよかった
540366313.en_literal: Hey, I'm glad I made it in time.
540366313.english: I'm just glad I could keep up with you!

774913804.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
774913804.jp_real: 見事よ、ベアトリクスさん
774913804.english: Nope, you did very good, Beatrix!

995050143.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
995050143.jp_real: ジョー、来たる時、花開く
995050143.en_literal: Here it comes, the time to bloom.
995050143.english: And the butterfly calls when the blossom flowers.

786671989.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
786671989.jp_real: あなたの力こそ、不可思議で奇妙。私の技に応用できるかな？
786671989.en_literal: Your power... it's strange and peculiar. Could I apply it to my techniques?
786671989.english: But your powers are so deep, so mysterious. I wonder if my techniques will ever compare.

199447747.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
199447747.jp_real: こちらこそ、助かっちゃった。
199447747.en_literal: You're the one who helped me!

65797031.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
65797031.en_literal: Hm hm, leave it to me!

883664025.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
883664025.english: Would you like to find out?

838072169.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
838072169.jp_real: うん、次もこの調子でいこっか！
838072169.en_literal: Hmph. Let's keep this momentum going!
838072169.english: We do seem to have a special connection.

826854050.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
826854050.english: I had been thinking the same thing.

397071217.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
397071217.jp_real: ヴェインさん、敵から目を離してはダメよ。
397071217.en_literal: Vane-san, you shouldn't take your eyes off the enemy.
397071217.english: Vane, keep your eyes on the enemy!

438240272.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
438240272.jp_real: 今のはジークフリートさんのおかげかな？
438240272.english: Like yin and yang, there is beauty in the joining of divergent elements.

149318649.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
149318649.jp_real: シャルロッテちゃんのおかげだよ
149318649.english: Only because you did such a wonderful job!

246051245.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
246051245.jp_real: うん。心で見れば、ついていける。
246051245.en_literal: Hmph. If you look with your heart, you can follow.
246051245.english: On the battlefield, I do not see so much as feel.

207065401.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
207065401.jp_real: 一点一画も揺るがせにせず
207065401.en_literal: Not a single point or corner shall be left unguarded.
207065401.english: Harmony is the key to success!

655156880.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
655156880.jp_real: えっ、何度だって合わせるわ！
655156880.en_literal: Huh? I'll meet you again, no matter how many times!
655156880.english: My blade is yours as long as you need it!

635717836.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
635717836.jp_real: わかったわ。先手必勝ね。

332365966.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
332365966.jp_real: ねえ、あなたのおかげね。
332365966.english: It was your power that got us this far.

398426519.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
398426519.jp_real: ありがとう、サンダルフォンさん
398426519.english: That's very sweet of you, Sandalphon!

662476723.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
662476723.jp_real: それは最高の褒め言葉ね
662476723.english: That's the nicest thing anyone has ever said to me!

196961517.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
196961517.jp_real: ありがとう。十天衆の人に認められると本当に嬉しいな。
196961517.en_literal: Thank you. I'm really happy to be acknowledged by someone like you.
196961517.english: Thank you... to think an eternal would take notice of me...

832267623.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
832267623.english: Was that a compliment? I hope...

570382597.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
570382597.jp_real: な、何もしてないんだけどな…

383546469.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
383546469.en_literal: Eh? I'll keep you company too!
383546469.english: Of course! I'm right behind you!

791589033.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
791589033.jp_real: ……シインなるコクム。刃のひらめきで立つ。
791589033.en_literal: The ultimate darkness stands firm in the glint of the blade.
791589033.english: The flash of my steel cuts through any darkness.

898719314.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
898719314.jp_real: ええ、もっと集中しなきゃ
898719314.en_literal: Huh? I need to focus more.
898719314.english: Yes! I must find my center of focus!

495929165.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
495929165.jp_real: わかったわ。私に任せて。

492547599.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
492547599.jp_real: おねえさんは全然平気だよ
492547599.english: Big sister will be just fine!

747035710.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
747035710.english: I am not yet worthy to be called a master.

590916768.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
590916768.jp_real: えっ？普通に斬りかかっただけだけど…
590916768.english: What? That was my usual footwork!

720454985.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
720454985.english: On the narrow path of war, one misstep leads to certain death.

888948616.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
888948616.jp_real: 花は歌い、蝶は舞う。これ以上ない組み合わせね。
888948616.en_literal: Flowers sing, butterflies dance. There's no better combination than this.
888948616.english: There is beauty to be found even on the battlefield.

487734443.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
487734443.jp_real: もっと頼ってくれてもいいんだからね
487734443.en_literal: You can rely on me more, you know.
487734443.english: I wish you'd let me spoil you some more.

75749870.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
75749870.jp_real: やいばと共に踊りましょ
75749870.en_literal: Let's dance together with our blades.
75749870.english: Let us carve our way through!

562529786.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
562529786.jp_real:
ユウオウマイシン！
いざ、参る！
562529786.en_literal: You're my shield. Now, I'm coming!
562529786.english: Then, let them carry us to victory!

411211280.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
411211280.jp_real: もちろん、慢心はしないわ。
411211280.en_literal: Of course. I won't be careless.

486785208.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
486785208.en_literal: Still... just a few more to go.
486785208.english: So my form is still wild and undisciplined?

107522376.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
107522376.en_literal: A punch that will surely hit the mark?
107522376.english: And just like the sun, it can both nurture and destroy.

366366481.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
366366481.jp_real: コウコのウライはワタシガタツ！
366366481.en_literal: I'll bear the burden of your grudges.

551532663.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
551532663.jp_real: 血の縁は人の輪にしかず
551532663.en_literal: The forest of blood is nothing but a human circle.
551532663.english: But wars are won on unity.

398194887.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
398194887.jp_real: えっ、あ、ぐ、頑張るっつー！

903913273.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
903913273.english: You're right. I mustn't lose focus.

823731219.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
823731219.jp_real: それはこちらのセリフよ！
823731219.english: I could say the same for you!

918971158.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
918971158.jp_real: アダナスすべてを切り刻まん
918971158.en_literal: I'll cut through everything without hesitation.
918971158.english: All who oppose us shall be cut in twain!

585192435.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600

585192435.en_literal: Uh, um... maybe you shouldn't fight back?
585192435.english: Maybe you should avoid dangerous situations in the first place?

242032106.english: My katana becomes like wind, cleaving lightning in twain.
